# Final Validation — issue-526 (adaptive, docs-only)

## Change kind
Docs-only design-track resolution. Deliverables:
- `docs/decisions/D-526-01.md` (new decision record, n5-record)
- `CHANGELOG.md` `### Changed` entry under [Unreleased] (n6-finalize)

No code, script, test, contract, or edition-tree file changed → **not a cross-edition diff**, so the #307 four-chain obligation does NOT attach (matches D-523-01's docs-only precedent).

## Adaptive barrier gates (script-enforced)
Ran from the worktree against `kaola-workflow/issue-526/workflow-plan.md`:
- `--resume-check` → pass (plan_hash integrity + structure + closed library)
- `--gate-verify` → pass (no code/sensitive node needs a post-dominating reviewer)
- `--barrier-check` → pass (`sensitiveHits:[]`, `outOfAllow:[]`, `foreignArchiveHits:[]`, `unattributed:[]` — only D-526-01.md + CHANGELOG.md written, both in their nodes' write sets)
- `--verdict-check` → pass (`checked:["n3-falsify"]`; investigation adversarial-verifier recorded `verdict: pass`/`findings_blocking: 0`, #509 exemption also applies)

All four exit 0.

## Self-host chain-receipt gate
Self-host (npm) repo → finalize-check requires `.cache/chain-receipt.json` fresh, HEAD-bound, all-green. The validator imposes no minimum chain set (it only verifies the chains present in the receipt are green). For this docs-only, non-#307 change the canonical **claude** chain is run as the comprehensive single-chain health signal at HEAD; receipt generated by the orchestrator after the impl commit.

## Verdict
PASS — docs-only deliverable, all four adaptive barrier gates green; chain receipt (claude) generated and green at the impl-commit HEAD (recorded in chain-receipt.json).
